text.title: Partner Swap Deal Template Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real deployments of Partner Swap Deal Template. Each pairs symptom + sourced root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Two API consultants swap referrals; every overlap becomes a competition; deal dies in 4 months.
antipattern.fix: Restrict swaps to adjacent specialties (API design ↔ Stripe integration, not API ↔ API).

antipattern.symptom: Partner A sends $20k client; expects $2k fee; Partner B sends 'thank you' note; relationship sours.
antipattern.fix: Document fee-split (e.g., 10% of first-month invoice, paid within 30 days); confirm pre-deal.

antipattern.symptom: Partner sends 5 misfit leads/month; recipient feels reciprocity pressure; no closes.
antipattern.fix: Tighten scope to specific vertical / stack / budget band; document filter criteria.
